name: Update Health
desc: Updates the player's health, food, and saturation.
notes: When health <= 0, the client shows the death screen.

implementation.overview: Updates player health/food/saturation. Modules: AutoRespawn (trigger on health<=0), AutoPot (trigger on low health), Regen, GodMode.

modules.name: AutoPot
modules.purpose: Auto-potion when health drops below threshold.
